channel.title: GitHub Solidity Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Solidity in GitHub

item.title: taikoxyz/taiko-mono
item.description: A based rollup. 🥁

item.title: matter-labs/era-contracts
item.description: Smart Contract Submodule For zkSync Era

item.title: scroll-tech/scroll
item.description: Scroll's Monorepo

item.title: AmazingAng/WTF-Solidity
item.description: 我最近在重新学solidity，巩固一下细节，也写一个“WTF Solidity极简入门”，供小白们使用，每周更新1-3讲。Now supports English! 官网: https://wtf.academy

item.title: Vectorized/solady
item.description: Optimized Solidity snippets.

item.title: Dapp-Learning-DAO/Dapp-Learning
item.description: Dapp learning project for developers at all stages. Becoming and cultivating sovereign individuals. Nonprofit organization.

item.title: LayerZero-Labs/LayerZero
item.description: An Omnichain Interoperability Protocol

item.title: foundry-rs/forge-std
item.description: Forge Standard Library is a collection of helpful contracts for use with forge and foundry. It leverages forge's cheatcodes to make writing tests easier and faster, while improving the UX of cheatcodes. For more in-depth usage examples checkout the tests.

item.title: Uniswap/v2-periphery
item.description: 🎚 Peripheral smart contracts for interacting with Uniswap V2

item.title: Uniswap/v4-core
item.description: 🦄 🦄 🦄 🦄 Core smart contracts of Uniswap v4

item.title: Coinsult/solidity
item.description: Smart contract audits are necessary for ensuring that smart contracts are free of any security issues.

item.title: a16z/erc4626-tests
item.description: ERC4626 Property Tests

item.title: dapphub/ds-test
item.description: Assertions, equality checks and other test helpers

item.title: storyprotocol/protocol-core
item.description: core protocol repo

item.title: interfinetwork/project-delivery-data
item.description: InterFi provides blockchain security and assessment services. In this repository, we'll upload audited smart contracts, and projects. To request a smart contract audit, contact https://t.me/interfiaudits or hello@interfi.network

item.title: bnb-chain/BEPs
item.description: BNB Evolution Proposals

item.title: ProjectOpenSea/seaport
item.description: Seaport is a marketplace protocol for safely and efficiently buying and selling NFTs.

item.title: berachain/offchain-sdk
item.description: A framework for building off-chain services for EVM chains

item.title: dmfxyz/murky
item.description: Merkle Proof Generator and Validator in Solidity

item.title: thirdweb-dev/contracts
item.description: Collection of smart contracts deployable via thirdweb

item.title: transmissions11/solmate
item.description: Modern, opinionated, and gas optimized building blocks for smart contract development.

item.title: MZero-Labs/common
item.description: M^0 common smart contracts
